flags.label: Public certificate-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Maysville Community and Technical College are 10% below the public certificate-predominant peer median ($32.2k vs $35.7k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Maysville Community and Technical College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.3% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Maysville Community and Technical College fell 58% between 2021 and 2024 ($15.2k → $6.4k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Maysville Community and Technical College rose 24% between 2006 and 2009 (27.8% → 34.3%).
